chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-894 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 09.09.2022. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Imam Bakhsh Dars, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J- During patrolling on 29.07.2022 the police party of P.S Talhar headed by ASI Sikandar Ali arrested, on spy information, co-accused Manzoor transporting Gutka in different cartoons weighing 15 K.Gs in a Suzuki. Applicant is stated to be available in the backside of Suzuki and made his escape good in jungle of date palms. 2. Learned Assistant P.G has opposed bail. However, the question of applicant’s escape from the spot in presence of the police party is yet to be decided by the trial Court. Apparently, the entire recovery is alleged against co-accused Manzoor and applicant is only stated to be present in the Suzuki. In the circumstances, mala fide on the part of complainant cannot be ruled out. Accordingly, the application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is confirmed on same terms and conditions. 3. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Shahid
